name: National Endpoint Protection Suite
description: Enterprise-scale endpoint detection and response platform deployed across all government and military systems. Combines antivirus, behavioral analysis, and automated response to detect and contain malware.

specialAbilities.name: Behavioral Threat Detection
specialAbilities.description: AI-based behavioral analysis detects novel malware and zero-day attacks that evade signature-based detection.

specialAbilities.name: Automated Quarantine
specialAbilities.description: Instantly isolates compromised endpoints from the network, preventing lateral movement of attackers.
